metrics.metric_note: final_mae/rmse/r2/mape = evaluate_final.py (MC Dropout T=20, model.eval()+Dropout.train(), log-SI, 353 hold-out, random split random_state=42, evaluation seed=42 for full reproducibility). train_val_mae = training-loop best epoch 21/24.

notes: Reproducible eval: torch.manual_seed(42) added to evaluate_final.py so MC Dropout masks are deterministic; metrics in this JSON are the canonical run. Domain-shift fix: random_state=42 split keeps extreme events represented in both sets (max_y_train=2.9788, max_y_val=2.9019). MC Dropout fix: use model.eval()+Dropout.train() instead of model.train(). ExtremeAugmentation applies pixel-perfect flip + rot90 only to extreme samples (SI > 2.0). Early stopping at epoch 24, best checkpoint at epoch 21 (train val_mae: 0.1071, log-SI). LR reduced from 0.001 to 0.0005 at epoch 19 and from 0.0005 to 0.00025 at epoch 23. Exported to ONNX opset 18 with do_constant_folding=True: 86.6 KB, 25.11 ms CPU (1.11x vs PyTorch CPU 27.90 ms).
